locations.test: withEnable=true: post-warm-start Q=0, ~Q=1 with no prior clock activity
withEnable=false: post-warm-start Q=0, ~Q=1 with no prior clock activity
withEnable=true: DCOP converges with Q / ~Q complementary at the documented init level
withEnable=false: DCOP converges with Q / ~Q complementary at the documented init level
first rising clock edge with T=1 toggles Q from 0 to 1
two successive rising edges with T=1 toggle Q back to 0
rising clock edge with T=0 holds Q at its current value
falling clock edge with T=1 does not toggle Q
first rising clock edge unconditionally toggles Q from 0 to 1
two successive rising edges toggle Q 0→1→0 unconditionally
vIH hot-load: raising vIH past current logic-high level suppresses subsequent rising-edge toggle
vIL hot-load: lowering vIL changes the band edge that defines clock-low for edge detection
forceToggle structural: withEnable=false (forceToggle=1) toggles on rising edge even with T LOW; withEnable=true (forceToggle=0) does not
